WhenTrackWhat
Mon 28 Sep 2026 Registered ReportsFull paper (EMSE) submission
Mon 2 Mar 2026 MSR AwardsNotification
Thu 26 Feb 2026 Registered ReportsAccepted RR submission
Fri 20 Feb 2026 FOSS AwardSelf-Nomination Closes
Fri 6 Feb 2026 FOSS AwardSelf-Nomination Opens
Sat 31 Jan 2026 Registered ReportsStage 1 notification
Mon 26 Jan 2026 TutorialsCamera-ready version
Mon 26 Jan 2026 Mining ChallengeCamera Ready [Papers]
Mon 26 Jan 2026 Technical PapersCamera Ready Deadline
Fri 23 Jan 2026 Data and Tool Showcase TrackCamera Ready Deadline

Wed 7 Jan 2026 Technical PapersAuthor Notification
Mon 5 Jan 2026 Data and Tool Showcase TrackAcceptance Notification

Tue 23 Dec 2025 Registered ReportsFirst feedback round
Fri 19 Dec 2025 TutorialsProposal submission deadline
Fri 19 Dec 2025 Industry TrackPaper Deadline
Thu 18 Dec 2025 Mining ChallengeAbstract Deadline [Papers]
Mon 8 - Thu 11 Dec 2025 Technical PapersAuthor Response Period

Mon 10 Nov 2025 Data and Tool Showcase TrackPaper Deadline

Mon 20 Oct 2025 Technical PapersAbstract Deadline

Mon 15 Sep 2025 Mining ChallengeCall for Challenge Papers Published [Challenge]
